ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on thyroxine (true/false) */,
  "sick" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is currently sick (true/false) */,
  "thyroid_surgery" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has had thyroid surgery (true/false) */,
  "I131_treatment" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has received I131 treatment (true/false) */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has queried for hyperthyroid symptoms (true/false) */,
  "lithium" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is taking lithium (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "TSH_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TSH was measured (true/false) */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH level measured */,
  "T3_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T3 was measured (true/false) */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 level measured */,
  "TT4_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TT4 was measured (true/false) */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 level measured */,
  "T4U_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T4U was measured (true/false) */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U level measured */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "test_result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient reporting symptoms */,
  "goitre" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has goitre (true/false) */,
  "tumor" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a tumor (true/false) */,
  "hypopituitary" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has hypopituitary issues (true/false) */,
  "psych" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has psychological symptoms (true/false) */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptoms were reported */,
  "symptom_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the symptoms */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient referred */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., other, SVI) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of diagnosis (e.g., negative, compensated_hypothyroid) */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date when the referral was made */,
  "referral_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the referral */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the referral record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the referral record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for the appointment */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinician for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the appointment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_history" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., medication, surgery) */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
